one_time_description: Land and building contributed by George Gordon First Nation TLE Trust - Principal Trust Account (non-cash contribution of land and buildings to the First Nation)
economic_notes: George Gordon Developments Limited Partnership is a commercial enterprise accounted for by modified equity method with net income of $254,710 for year ended Dec 31, 2019. Gordon Retail Centre is a consolidated retail operation. First Nation is located in Treaty 4 Territory, Saskatchewan. CMHC reserves are underfunded by $791,457.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Province is Saskatchewan (SK). Large one-time non-cash item: $9,086,078 land and buildings contributed by George Gordon TLE Trust - Principal Trust Account, which is excluded from consolidation as Chief and Council do not control the Trust. This contribution drove the large annual surplus of $11.36M versus operating surplus of $2.27M. Consolidated entities include: George Gordon First Nation, CMHC Housing, Gordon Retail Centre, Off-Reserve Advisory Board Inc., TLE Revenue Account, and TLE Holdings Ltd. George Gordon Developments Limited Partnership is accounted for by modified equity method (1 GBE). TLE Trust - Principal Trust Account is excluded from consolidation. CMHC reserves are underfunded by $791,457. isc_funding includes both ISC ($7,476,441) and ISC-FNIHB ($2,013,783) totaling $9,490,224. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($9,490,224) plus CMHC ($434,068) plus Touchwood Agency Tribal Council ($629,007) = $10,353,299; also includes Community Development Corporation $369,066 if government-funded bringing total to approximately $10,358,399. No schedule of remuneration was included in the provided text.
